title: Del Rey
content:
{{Top|rwc}}
{{Citation}}
{{RealCompany
|image=[[File:DelRey.svg]]

'''Del Rey''' is a science-fiction and fantasy [[Wikipedia:Imprint (trade name)|imprint]] of [[Random House]], beginning as an imprint of [[Ballantine Books]]. The imprint is responsible for most of Random House's science-fiction publications, including most of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' books (with the exception of novels published between [[1991]] and [[1999]], which are still reprinted as [[Bantam Spectra]] books).<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref>

In late [[June]] [[2004]], it renewed its contract with [[Lucas Licensing]] to extend its book licensing agreement through [[December]] [[2008]]<ref name="usatoday">{{WebCite|url=https://usatoday30.usatoday.com/life/books/news/2004-06-23-star-wars-books_x.htm|text='Star Wars' books are soldiering on|author=Eng, Dinah|date=2004-06-23|archivedate=20191205035824}}</ref> and later also continued to print ''Star Wars'' books.<ref name="CONV">''[[The High Republic: Convergence]]''</ref>

In [[May]] [[2022]], Random House announced that all of its licenced publications, including ''Star Wars'', were moving to a new imprint, [[Random House Worlds]],<ref name="Random House Worlds">{{PenguinRandomHouse|subdomain=global|url=announcements/random-house-launches-new-imprint-random-house-worlds|text=Random House Launches New Imprint, Random House Worlds}}</ref> while Del Rey will refocus on publishing original speculative fiction.<ref name="FAQ">{{WebCite|url=https://www.readstarwars.com/news|text=News|date=2022-05-17|archivedate=20220517165101}}</ref> The team who worked for ''Star Wars'' products under Del Rey moved to Random House.<ref name="Tom Twitter 1">{{Twitter|DarthInternous|status/1615882677940326403|[[Tom Hoeler]]|date=2023-01-18|quote=*published by Random House Worlds (same team / new name & logo. Technically speaking the last SW book Del Rey published was Convergence.)|archivedate=20230314234143}}</ref><ref name="Tom Twitter 2">{{Twitter|DarthInternous|status/1618036861221634048|[[Tom Hoeler]]|date=2023-01-24|quote=Yep. Same people different logo.|archivedate=20230314234525}}</ref>

Del Rey has social media accounts under the label Star Wars Books that announce any news related to ''Star Wars'' books by Del Rey.<ref name="Twitter">{{Twitter|username=delreystarwars|name=Star Wars Books|archivedate=20120521160508}}</ref><ref name="Facebook">{{Facebook|username=starwarsbooks|name=Star Wars Books|archivedate=20120521160508}}</ref>

{{Company-stub|real}}
